title: Ukraine Pounds Russian Ships in Its Campaign to Cut Off Crimea
summary_full: After striking roads and railways, Kyiv is now focusing on sea routes as it tries to disrupt fuel supplies and pressure Russia to end the war.
summary_public: After striking roads and railways, Kyiv is now focusing on sea routes as it tries to disrupt fuel supplies and pressure Russia to end the war.
